original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Ella, Abigail, Michael, and Jack. "Michael is a knight" - Ella. Abigail said that Michael is not a knave. Michael told you that If Ella is a knight then Michael is a knight. Jack commented, "Ella is a knave". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
